name: scheduling_modal_with_recurring_support
description: Patient scheduling modal with provider license filtering, recurring appointment support, FHIR availability analysis, and capacity-based provider recommendations.

handlers.description: SimpleAPI serving the scheduling UI and JSON endpoints for provider list, availability, and booking.
